prompt: Create a cinematic fantasy nature landscape of a tranquil lotus pond at sunrise. The scene shows one tall blue-gray heron standing in shallow reflective water at the center, its long neck in profile and its reflection visible beneath it. Surround the foreground with large green lily pads and exactly eight prominent pink lotus flowers: three large open blossoms along the lower left foreground, one closed lotus bud near the left front, one open blossom just left of center, one upright closed bud near the lower center-right, one large open blossom at the lower right, and one smaller open blossom farther back on the right side of the pond. On the far left, place a dark ancient weeping cherry tree with twisting branches draping long curtains of pale pink blossoms over the water. The background should include a misty lake surface, forested hills and tall pine silhouettes, warm orange-gold sunlight rising near the upper center-right, and a small distant Japanese-style pavilion or gazebo on the right shoreline. Use soft dawn fog, glowing peach and rose sky, gentle sun rays, mirrorlike water reflections, highly detailed petals and leaves, atmospheric depth, dreamy serene mood, photorealistic fantasy realism, wide 16:9 composition, no people, no text, no watermark. Optional custom details: make the main bird a blue-gray heron, set the flower color to pink, set the time of day to sunrise, set the setting to misty Japanese garden lotus pond, and use a cinematic photorealistic fantasy realism style.
